## Definition of Done
- [ ] Code complete with unit tests (>80% coverage)
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] Integration tests passing
- [ ] Security scan passed
- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] Deployed to staging
- [ ] PO acceptance

## Estimation
- [ ] S (2-4 hours)
- [ ] M (4-8 hours)
- [ ] L (1-2 days)
- [ ] XL (3-5 days)
